summary: IaC Live AWS/GitHub Integration Testing Complete. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Infrastructure tab verified with LIVE data from AWS Lambda (9 functions), GitHub Actions (15 runs), and S3 connection.
critical_code_review_comments: All live endpoints working correctly with real AWS/GitHub API data
GET /api/cve/iac/live-status returns connected=true for AWS Lambda, S3, and GitHub
GET /api/cve/iac/lambda/live returns 9 real Lambda functions with CloudWatch metrics
GET /api/cve/iac/github/runs returns 15 real workflow runs from johnlegerronspivey/bigmannentertainment repo
GET /api/cve/iac/terraform/state returns connected=true with expected 'No state file' error (Terraform not deployed yet)
GET /api/cve/iac/overview includes live_connections field with all services connected
asyncio.to_thread() properly wraps synchronous boto3/PyGitHub calls to prevent event loop blocking
Frontend Live Connections status bar shows LIVE badges for all 3 services
Frontend displays 9 Live Lambda functions with metrics, 15 GitHub runs with status badges
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test deployment via POST /api/cve/iac/deployments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: IaC Live AWS/GitHub integration complete. All 4 new live endpoints tested (/live-status, /lambda/live, /github/runs, /terraform/state). Frontend Infrastructure tab shows real-time data from AWS (9 Lambda functions with metrics) and GitHub (15 workflow runs). Terraform state shows expected 'No state file' error since Terraform hasn't been deployed to S3 bucket yet.

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from LIVE AWS APIs (Lambda, S3, CloudWatch) and GitHub API using credentials in .env
